/usr/bin/c++   -w -std=c++11 -DAIUI_LINUX -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic -Wl,-rpath,$ORIGIN:$ORIGIN/libs CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/jsoncpp/json_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/jsoncpp/json_value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/jsoncpp/json_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/utils/Base64Util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/utils/ConvertUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/utils/IatResultUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aiui_sample.dir/src/utils/StreamNlpTtsHelper.cpp.o  -o /home/zj/桌面/毕业设计/Linux_aiui6.8.0003.0008_9449f0a6/bin_x64/aiui_sample   -L/home/zj/桌面/毕业设计/Linux_aiui6.8.0003.0008_9449f0a6/samples/../libs/x64  -laiui
